description: Power BI workspace configuration for Clearwater Health Analytics. Replaces legacy SSRS folder-based permissions and Crystal Reports file-share distribution with a centralized Power BI workspace.

workspace.name: Clearwater Health Analytics
workspace.description: Consolidated reporting workspace for Clearwater Health System — migrated from SSRS 2016 and Crystal Reports. Contains interactive reports, paginated reports, the shared semantic model, and deployment pipelines.

roles.description: Full workspace control — manage members, publish content, configure pipelines, manage gateway connections. Replaces SSRS Content Manager role and Crystal Reports IT administrator access.

members.legacyEquivalent: CLEARWATER\Domain Admins — SSRS Content Manager on all folders; Crystal Reports IT admin with .rpt file-share write access

roles.description: Publish and edit reports, manage personal subscriptions, share reports within the workspace. Replaces SSRS Publisher role on /RevenueCycle/ and /Clinical/ folders.

members.legacyEquivalent: CLEARWATER\SSRS_Publishers — published .rdl files to SSRS report server
CLEARWATER\Finance_All — had SSRS Publisher role on /RevenueCycle/ for maintaining revenue reports

roles.description: Create and edit reports using the shared semantic model but cannot publish datasets or manage access. Replaces SSRS Report Builder role for department-level report authors.

members.legacyEquivalent: CLEARWATER\Clinical_Staff — had SSRS Report Builder access on /Clinical/ folder for ad-hoc quality reports
Department managers who created ad-hoc Crystal Reports using the shared Oracle REPORTS_USER connection

roles.description: View and interact with published reports, create personal subscriptions, export data where allowed. Replaces SSRS Browser role and Crystal Reports viewer access.

members.legacyEquivalent: finance-team@clearwaterhealth.org — SSRS email subscription recipient for Daily Revenue PDF
nursing-supervisors@clearwaterhealth.org — SSRS email subscription recipient for Patient Census PDF (3×/day)
compliance@clearwaterhealth.org — SSRS email subscription recipient for Quality Metrics Excel (monthly)
Crystal Reports viewer — PatientCensus.rpt and SurgicalOutcomes.rpt via client application

legacyDistributionGroupMapping.description: Maps legacy email distribution groups from Subscriptions/SubscriptionConfig.xml to Power BI workspace roles.

mappings.notes: CFO also has Admin-level visibility via ExecutiveRole RLS — sees all departments
Finance team members see data scoped by their department via RLS
Quality Director has unrestricted access to all quality metrics
Compliance officers need full metrics for regulatory reporting
Nursing supervisors need all-ward visibility for staffing decisions

gatewayConfiguration.description: On-premises data gateway for Azure SQL connectivity during hybrid transition period. Will be removed once all data sources are fully migrated to Azure SQL.
